core_mechanism: degree-based mean-field rate equations for a compartmental contagion/spreading process (susceptible-infected-recovered-type transitions between states) on a heterogeneous network, where the node-degree distribution enters the transmission terms
brief_reason: The abstract derives mean-field equations for a spreading process on complex heterogeneous and scale-free networks and solves them via a stochastic/Monte Carlo scheme, which is a degree-structured compartmental contagion model.
